<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Edit with Claude Modal</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">

    <script type="myop/types">
    // =============================================================================
    // MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
    // =============================================================================

    /**
     * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
     */
    interface MyopInitData {
      mode?: 'tabs' | 'wizard';
      prompt?: string;
      componentCode?: string;
      initialTab?: 'claude-mcp' | 'gemini' | 'ide';
      // Wizard mode properties
      wizardStep?: number;
      selectedBuilder?: string | null;
      originalComponentId?: string;
      builders?: Array<{
        id: string;
        name: string;
        icon: 'pixie' | 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'ide';
      }>;
    }

    /**
     * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
     */
    interface MyopCtaPayloads {
      'builder-selected': { builderId: string };
      'code_copied': { code: string };
      'close_modal': {};
      'link_copied': { url: string };
      'open_claude': {};
      'open_claude_with_prompt': { prompt: string };
      'open_gemini': {};
      'open_myop_agent': {};
      'open_myop_builder': {};
      'prompt_copied': { prompt: string };
      'tab_changed': { tab: string };
      'task_cta_clicked': { action: string };
      'watch_video_clicked': { targetTab: string };
      'wizard_step_changed': { step: number };
    }

    // =============================================================================
    // DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
    // =============================================================================

    declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
    declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

    declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
      action: K,
      payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
    ): void;
    </script>

    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            background: #fff;
            display: block;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .modal-content {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 549px;
            background: #fff;
        }

        .modal-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 11px;
        }

        .modal-title {
            overflow: hidden;
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 17px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 22px;
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        /* Carousel Styles */
        .carousel-container {
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .carousel-track {
            display: flex;
            transition: transform 0.4s ease;
        }

        .carousel-slide {
            min-width: 100%;
            padding: 0;
        }

        .slide-content {
            min-height: 200px;
        }

        .video-placeholder {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
            background: #f5f5f0;
            border-radius: 7px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0db;
        }

        .video-placeholder svg {
            width: 43px;
            height: 43px;
            color: #9747FF;
            opacity: 0.6;
        }

        .video-container {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
            background: transparent;
            border-radius: 7px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 11px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .video-container video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            background: transparent;
        }

        #geminiVideoContainer {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 549px;
            aspect-ratio: 549 / 309;
        }

        #ideVideo video {
            object-fit: contain;
        }

        .step-title {
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 22px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .step-text {
            color: var(--Grey-dark, #373539);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 22px;
            letter-spacing: -0.14px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .step-text:last-of-type {
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        .mcp-link {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            background: #f5f5f0;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0db;
            border-radius: 5px;
            padding: 5px 9px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: #373539;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s;
            margin: 4px 0 5px 0;
            position: relative;
        }

        .mcp-link:hover {
            background: #eaeae5;
        }

        .mcp-link svg {
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .quote-text {
            color: var(--Grey-dark, #373539);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: italic;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 22px;
            letter-spacing: -0.14px;
            margin: 7px 0;
        }

        /* Footer with action button and navigation */
        .carousel-footer {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-top: 18px;
            padding-top: 0;
        }

        .footer-buttons {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 11px;
        }

        .open-claude-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 7px;
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            color: #0A090A;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 0 14px;
            height: 27px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 27px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .open-claude-btn:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            border-color: var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
        }

        .open-claude-btn .claude-icon path {
            fill: #0A090A;
        }

        .claude-icon {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .gemini-icon {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* AI Buttons Container */
        .ai-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 11px;
        }

        .ai-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 7px;
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            color: #0A090A;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 0 14px;
            height: 27px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 27px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .ai-btn:hover {
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            border-color: var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
        }

        .ai-btn .claude-icon path,
        .ai-btn .gemini-icon path {
            fill: #0A090A;
        }

        .next-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: #0A090A;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }

        .next-btn:hover {
            color: #9747FF;
        }

        .next-btn svg path {
            transition: stroke 0.2s;
        }

        .next-btn:hover svg path {
            stroke: #9747FF;
        }

        /* Progress dots */
        .progress-dots {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .progress-dot {
            width: 11px;
            height: 11px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 1px solid #3E3D3E;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 0;
        }

        .progress-dot.active {
            background: #9157F7;
        }

        /* Tabs Styles */
        .tabs-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 7px;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E5E5;
            padding-bottom: 0;
        }

        .tab-button {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 9px 14px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
            margin-bottom: -1px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: #0A090A;
            cursor: pointer;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .tab-button:hover:not(.disabled) {
            color: #0A090A;
        }

        .tab-button.active {
            color: #0A090A;
            border-bottom-color: #9747FF;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        /* Base disabled tab button */
        .tab-button.disabled {
            color: #B8B8B8;
            cursor: default;
            position: relative;
        }

        .tab-button.disabled:hover {
            color: #B8B8B8;
        }

        /* Gradient tooltip - hidden by default */
        .coming-soon-tooltip {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            margin-top: 8px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #9747FF, #E85D3B, #FF8651, #FFBEA8, #A397F5, #9747FF);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            border-radius: 5px;
            padding: 5px 9px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 400;
            z-index: 100;
            color: #fff;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 11px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }

        /* Show tooltip with moving gradient animation on hover */
        .tab-button.disabled:hover .coming-soon-tooltip {
            display: inline-flex;
            animation: moveGradient 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        /* Moving gradient animation */
        @keyframes moveGradient {
            0% {
                background-position: 0% 50%;
            }

            50% {
                background-position: 100% 50%;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: 0% 50%;
            }
        }

        .tab-content {
            display: none;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .tab-content.active {
            display: block;
        }

        /* Single page steps layout */
        .steps-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
            margin-top: 24px;
        }

        /* Hide steps only in Myop Pixie tab */
        #tab-myop-pixie .steps-list {
            display: none;
        }

        .step-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }

        .step-number {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            min-width: 24px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #F0E8FF;
            color: #9747FF;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .step-item-content {
            flex: 1;
        }

        .step-item-title {
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 22px;
            margin-bottom: 2px;
        }

        .step-item-text {
            color: var(--Grey-dark, #373539);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 22px;
            letter-spacing: -0.14px;
        }

        .step-item-text .mcp-link {
            margin: 0;
            vertical-align: baseline;
        }

        .watch-video-link {
            color: #9747FF;
            text-decoration: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        .watch-video-link:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .myop-agent-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 7px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #9747FF 0%, #E85D3B 100%);
            color: #FFF;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 0 14px;
            height: 27px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 27px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: opacity 0.2s;
        }

        .myop-agent-btn:hover {
            background: #9157F7;
        }

        /* Ensure wizard button gets gradient when using myop-agent-btn class */
        #wizardNextBtn.myop-agent-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #9747FF 0%, #E85D3B 100%) !important;
            color: #FFF !important;
            height: 27px;
            padding: 0 14px;
            line-height: 27px;
            font-size: 13px;
        }

        #wizardNextBtn.myop-agent-btn:hover {
            background: #9157F7 !important;
        }

        .myop-agent-icon {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* Edit Manually Tab Content */
        .manual-edit-content {
            min-height: 216px;
        }

        .manual-edit-content .step-text {
            margin-bottom: 14px;
        }

        /* Video Play Overlay Styles */
        .video-container.has-overlay video {
            filter: blur(8px);
            transform: scale(1.02);
            transition: filter 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        .video-play-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            border-radius: 7px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s ease;
        }

        .overlay-step-text {
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 200;
            color: #fff;
            margin-top: 12px;
        }

        .video-play-overlay:hover {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }

        .video-play-overlay:hover .overlay-play-button {
            transform: scale(1.1);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(151, 71, 255, 0.4);
        }

        .overlay-play-button {
            width: 56px;
            height: 56px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #fff;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        .overlay-play-button svg {
            width: 22px;
            height: 22px;
            margin-left: 2px;
            color: #9747FF;
        }

        /* Wizard Mode Styles */
        .wizard-container {
            display: none;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0;
            background: #fff;
        }

        .wizard-container.active {
            display: flex;
        }

        .wizard-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            padding: 0;
        }

        .wizard-steps-indicator {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            align-items: center;
            margin: 0 0 24px 0;
        }

        .wizard-step-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .wizard-step-dot {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #fff;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 16px;
            color: #6A696A;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .wizard-step-dot.active {
            background: #F0E8FF;
            border-color: #8039FD;
            color: #3E3D3E;
        }


        /* Done State - show checkmark */
        .wizard-step-dot.completed {
            background: #F0E8FF;
            border-color: transparent;
            color: transparent;
            position: relative;
        }

        .wizard-step-dot.completed::after {
            content: '';
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml,<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M2.625 8.875L5.03125 11.375L12.25 2.625" stroke="%238039FD" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>');
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-position: center;
            background-size: contain;
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        }


        .wizard-step-label {
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 14px;
            color: #6A696A;
            white-space: nowrap;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .wizard-step-item.active .wizard-step-label {
            color: #0A090A;
        }

        .wizard-step-separator {
            width: 32px;
            height: 1px;
            background: #D3D1D5;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .wizard-step-content {
            display: none;
            animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
        }

        .wizard-step-content.active {
            display: block;
        }

        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(10px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        /* Wizard Step Content Containers */
        .wizard-step-content {
            display: none;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: flex-start;
            padding: 0 0 32px 0;
            gap: 24px;
        }

        .wizard-step-content.active {
            display: flex;
        }

        /* Step 1: Task Overview */
        .task-overview {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .task-title {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 32px;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .task-description {
            color: #373539;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .task-steps-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-top: 16px;
        }

        .task-step-item {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .task-step-number {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            min-width: 24px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #F0E8FF;
            color: #9747FF;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .task-step-text {
            color: #373539;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            margin: 0;
            padding-top: 2px;
        }

        /* Task bullets (for Task 0) */
        .task-bullets-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2px;
            margin-top: 16px;
        }

        .task-bullet-title {
            color: #0A090A;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 20px;
            margin: 0;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }

        .task-bullet-title:first-child {
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        .task-bullet-example {
            color: #706E73;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            margin: 0;
        }

        /* Step 2: Builder Selection */
        .builder-selection-title {
            color: #0A090A;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 32px;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .builders-grid {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            align-content: center;
            padding: 7px;
            gap: 7px;
            background: linear-gradient(86.16deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.4) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.4) 95.9%);
            width: 500px;
        }

        .builder-card {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 5px 7px 7px;
            gap: 9px;
            width: 162px;
            height: 162px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            border-radius: 7px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .builder-card:hover {
            border-color: #9747FF;
            background: #F9F7FF;
        }

        .builder-card.selected {
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Purple-90, #8039FD);
            background: var(--Purple-2, #F9F6FF);
        }

        .builder-card-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 2px 0 0;
            gap: 7px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            width: 148px;
            height: 121px;
        }

        .builder-icon {
            width: 22px;
            height: 22px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .builder-icon svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .builder-name {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            text-align: center;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 18px;
            margin: 0;
            max-width: 90px;
            white-space: normal;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            overflow-wrap: break-word;
        }

        /* Step 3: Start Building (shows selected builder's tab) */
        .wizard-tabs-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 7px;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E5E5;
            padding-bottom: 0;
        }

        .wizard-tab-button {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 9px 14px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
            margin-bottom: -1px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: #0A090A;
            cursor: pointer;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .wizard-tab-button.active {
            color: #0A090A;
            border-bottom-color: #9747FF;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        /* Wizard Footer */
        .wizard-footer {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            margin-top: 8px;
        }

        .wizard-footer-navigation {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .wizard-footer-navigation.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        .wizard-back-btn {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 4px 16px;
            gap: 0;
            width: 68px;
            height: 34px;
            background: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .wizard-back-btn:hover {
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
        }

        .wizard-back-btn svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            margin-right: -2px;
            transition: stroke 0.2s;
        }

        .wizard-back-btn:hover svg {
            stroke: #9747FF;
        }

        .wizard-back-btn:disabled {
            opacity: 0.4;
            cursor: default;
        }

        .wizard-back-btn:disabled:hover {
            color: #0A090A;
            border-color: #D3D1D5;
        }

        .wizard-back-btn:disabled:hover svg {
            stroke: #0A090A;
        }

        .wizard-next-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 7px;
            background: #3E3D3E;
            color: #fff;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            height: 34px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 22px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .wizard-next-btn:hover {
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: #9747FF;
        }

        .wizard-next-btn:disabled {
            background: #E5E4E4;
            color: #B6B5B7;
            cursor: default;
        }

        .wizard-next-btn:disabled:hover {
            background: #E5E4E4;
        }

        .task-cta-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 4px;
            background: #3E3D3E;
            color: #fff;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            width: 247px;
            height: 34px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .task-cta-btn:hover {
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: #9747FF;
        }

        .task-cta-btn-auto {
            width: auto !important;
        }

        .task-cta-btn svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* Hide regular tabs and content when in wizard mode */
        .wizard-container.active ~ .tabs-container,
        .wizard-container.active ~ .tab-content,
        .wizard-container.active ~ .carousel-footer {
            display: none;
        }

        .wizard-container.active ~ * {
            /* Handled by specific selectors above */
        }

        /* Hide modal header when wizard is active */
        .modal-content:has(.wizard-container.active) .modal-header {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Mobile responsive styles */
        @media (max-width: 765px) {
            .wizard-header {
                padding: 0;
                margin-bottom: 24px;
            }

            .wizard-steps-indicator {
                gap: 3px;
                width: 100%;
                justify-content: flex-start;
            }

            .wizard-step-item {
                gap: 3px;
            }

            .wizard-step-dot {
                width: 16px;
                height: 16px;
                font-size: 9px;
            }

            .wizard-step-label {
                font-size: 10px;
                line-height: 12px;
            }

            .wizard-step-separator {
                width: 12px;
            }

            /* Thin transparent scrollbar for mobile */
            body::-webkit-scrollbar {
                width: 4px;
            }

            body::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
                background: transparent;
            }

            body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
                background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
                border-radius: 2px;
            }

            body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
                background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            }

            /* Firefox */
            body {
                scrollbar-width: thin;
                scrollbar-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) transparent;
            }

            /* Builders grid mobile responsive */
            .builders-grid {
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 100%;
                padding: 5px;
                gap: 5px;
            }

            .builder-card {
                width: calc(50% - 2.5px);
                height: auto;
                min-width: 0;
            }

            .builder-card-content {
                width: 100%;
                height: auto;
                aspect-ratio: 1;
                padding: 4px 6px 6px;
            }

            .builder-icon {
                height: 22px;
            }

            .builder-name {
                font-size: 11px;
                line-height: 14px;
            }
        }

        /* Large mobile devices (iPhone Pro Max, etc.) - use desktop card sizes */
        @media (min-width: 428px) and (max-width: 765px) {
            .builders-grid {
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 500px;
                margin: 0 auto;
            }

            .builder-card {
                width: 162px;
                height: 162px;
            }

            .builder-card-content {
                width: 148px;
                height: 121px;
            }

            .builder-icon {
                height: 22px;
            }

            .builder-name {
                font-size: 12px;
                line-height: 16px;
            }

            .wizard-step-label {
                font-size: 12px;
                line-height: 16px;
            }
        }

        /* iPad responsive styles (including iPad mini) */
        @media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1024px) {
            .wizard-header {
                padding: 0;
                margin-bottom: 28px;
            }

            .wizard-steps-indicator {
                gap: 6px;
            }

            .wizard-step-item {
                gap: 5px;
            }

            .wizard-step-dot {
                width: 20px;
                height: 20px;
                font-size: 11px;
            }

            .wizard-step-label {
                font-size: 13px;
                line-height: 16px;
            }

            .wizard-step-separator {
                width: 24px;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

            function updateWizardStep() {
                // Hide all steps
                document.querySelectorAll('.wizard-step-content').forEach(step => {
                    step.classList.remove('active');
                });

                // Show current step
                const stepEl = document.getElementById(`wizardStep${wizardStep}`);
                if (stepEl) {
                    stepEl.classList.add('active');
                }

                // Update step indicator dots and items
                const stepItems = document.querySelectorAll('.wizard-step-item');
                const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.wizard-step-dot');

                // For Task 0, map step 3 to display as step 2
                const isTask0 = wizardData && wizardData.task && wizardData.task.id === 'task-0';
                const displayStep = (isTask0 && wizardStep === 3) ? 2 : wizardStep;

                stepItems.forEach((item, index) => {
                    if (index + 1 === displayStep) {
                        item.classList.add('active');
                        item.classList.remove('completed');
                    } else if (index + 1 < displayStep) {
                        item.classList.remove('active');
                        item.classList.add('completed');
                    } else {
                        item.classList.remove('active', 'completed');
                    }
                });

                dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                    if (index + 1 === displayStep) {
                        dot.classList.remove('completed');
                        dot.classList.add('active');
                    } else if (index + 1 < displayStep) {
                        dot.classList.remove('active');
                        dot.classList.add('completed');
                    } else {
                        dot.classList.remove('active', 'completed');
                    }
                });

                // Control footer button visibility
                const ctaBtn = document.getElementById('taskCtaBtn');
                const navigation = document.getElementById('wizardFooterNavigation');

                if (wizardStep === 1) {
                    // Step 1: Show only CTA button
                    if (ctaBtn) ctaBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';
                    if (navigation) navigation.classList.add('hidden');
                } else {
                    // Steps 2 & 3: Show navigation buttons, hide CTA
                    if (ctaBtn) ctaBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    if (navigation) navigation.classList.remove('hidden');
                }

                // Update back button state
                const backBtn = document.getElementById('wizardBackBtn');
                backBtn.disabled = wizardStep === 1;

                // Update next button text and state

            });


            // Public API
            window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
                if (data === undefined) {
                    return { currentSlide, prompt, componentCode, wizardStep, selectedBuilder, currentMode };
                }

                // Check if wizard mode
                if (data?.mode === 'wizard') {
                    currentMode = 'wizard';
                    wizardStep = data.wizardStep || 1;
                    selectedBuilder = data.selectedBuilder || null;

                    // Look up task from guideDatabase using originalComponentId
                    const componentId = data.originalComponentId;
                    const task = componentId ? guideDatabase[componentId] : defaultGuide;

                    // Construct wizardData with task from database
                    wizardData = {
                        mode: 'wizard',
                        wizardStep,
                        selectedBuilder,
                        originalComponentId: componentId,
                        task: task,
                        builders: [
                            { id: 'myop-pixie', name: 'Build with Myop Pixie', icon: 'pixie' },
                            { id: 'claude-mcp', name: 'Build with Claude', icon: 'claude' },
                            { id: 'gemini', name: 'Build with Gemini', icon: 'gemini' },
                            { id: 'ide', name: 'Build with IDE', icon: 'ide' }
                        ]
                    };

                    // Show wizard, hide tabs
                    document.getElementById('wizardContainer').classList.add('active');

                    // Render wizard content
                    renderWizard();
                    updateWizardStep();
                } else {
                    // Tabs mode (default)
                    currentMode = 'tabs';
                    document.getElementById('wizardContainer').classList.remove('active');

                    if (data?.prompt) {
                        prompt = data.prompt;
                    }
                    if (data?.componentCode) {
                        componentCode = data.componentCode;
                    }
                    if (data?.initialTab) {
                        const tabBtn = document.querySelector(`.tab-button[data-tab="${data.initialTab}"]`);
                        if (tabBtn && !tabBtn.classList.contains('disabled')) {
                            tabBtn.click();
                        }
                    }
                }
            };

            window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
                console.log('CTA Handler:', action_id, payload);
            };

        })();
    </script>

    <script id="myop_preview">
        window.myop_init_interface({
            "mode": "wizard",
            "wizardStep": 1,
            "selectedBuilder": null,
            "originalComponentId": "d449194b-2b6c-4fb9-801e-1756cc6635b8"
        });
    </script>
